script.source: if (ctx.containsKey("data") && ctx.data != null && ctx.data.containsKey("attack_type") && ctx.data.attack_type != null && ctx.data.attack_type != "") { def noise = ["Abuse of Functionality","Buffer Overflow","HTTP Parser Attack","Forceful Browsing","Detection Evasion","Information Leakage", "Other Application Activity","Predictable Resource Location","Predictable Resource Location"]; def parts = ctx.data.attack_type.splitOnToken(","); def kept = new java.util.ArrayList(); for (int i=0;i<parts.length;i++){ def v = parts[i].trim(); if (!noise.contains(v)) { kept.add(v); } } if (kept.size() > 0){ ctx.data.attack_type = String.join(",", kept); } else {ctx.data.attack_type = parts[0];} }

if (ctx.containsKey("data") && ctx.data != null) { if (ctx.data.containsKey("crscore") && ctx.data.crscore != null && ctx.data.crscore != "") { try { def v = ctx.data.crscore.toString().trim(); ctx.data.crscorenumeric = (int) Double.parseDouble(v);} catch (Exception e) { ctx.data.crscorenumeric = 0; } } }

if (ctx.containsKey("data") && ctx.data != null && ctx.data.containsKey("request") && ctx.data.request != null && ctx.data.request != ""){ def host = "N/A"; def parts = ctx.data.request.splitOnToken("\\r\\n"); if (parts.length > 0) { for (int i=0;i<parts.length;i++){ def trimmed = parts[i].trim(); if (trimmed.toLowerCase().startsWith("host:")) { host = trimmed.substring(5).trim(); break; } } } ctx.data.host=host; }

if (ctx.containsKey("data") && ctx.data != null) { if (ctx.data.containsKey("rcvdbyte") && ctx.data.rcvdbyte != null && ctx.data.rcvdbyte != "") { try { def v = ctx.data.rcvdbyte.toString().trim(); ctx.data.rcvdbytenumeric = (int) Double.parseDouble(v);} catch (Exception e) { ctx.data.rcvdbytenumeric = 0; } } }

if (ctx.containsKey("data") && ctx.data != null) { if (ctx.data.containsKey("sentbyte") && ctx.data.sentbyte != null && ctx.data.sentbyte != "") { try { def v = ctx.data.sentbyte.toString().trim(); ctx.data.sentbytenumeric = (int) Double.parseDouble(v);} catch (Exception e) { ctx.data.sentbytenumeric = 0; } } }

if (ctx.containsKey("data") && ctx.data != null && ctx.decoder.name == "fortinet-fortigate-firewall" && ctx.data.type=="traffic" && ctx.data.subtype=="forward"){ if(ctx.data.action=="accept" || ctx.data.action=="close" || ctx.data.action=="timeout"){ if(ctx.data.srcintfrole=="lan" && ctx.data.dstintfrole=="wan"){ def dstip = ctx.data.dstip; if(dstip != null && dstip.contains('.')){ def parts = dstip.splitOnToken('.'); if(parts.length == 4){ long ip = Long.parseLong(parts[0]) * 16777216L + Long.parseLong(parts[1]) * 65536L + Long.parseLong(parts[2]) * 256L + Long.parseLong(parts[3]); boolean is10 = (ip >= 167772160L && ip <= 184549375L); boolean is172 = (ip >= 2886729728L && ip <= 2887778303L); boolean is192 = (ip >= 3232235520L && ip <= 3232301055L); boolean isLoopback = (ip >= 2130706432L && ip <= 2147483647L); if(!is10 && !is172 && !is192 && !isLoopback){ ctx.data.traffic_direction = 'outbound'; } } } } else if(ctx.data.srcintfrole=="wan" && ctx.data.dstintfrole=="lan"){ def srcip = ctx.data.srcip; if(srcip != null && srcip.contains('.')){ def parts = srcip.splitOnToken('.'); if(parts.length == 4){ long ip = Long.parseLong(parts[0]) * 16777216L + Long.parseLong(parts[1]) * 65536L + Long.parseLong(parts[2]) * 256L + Long.parseLong(parts[3]); boolean is10 = (ip >= 167772160L && ip <= 184549375L); boolean is172 = (ip >= 2886729728L && ip <= 2887778303L); boolean is192 = (ip >= 3232235520L && ip <= 3232301055L); boolean isLoopback = (ip >= 2130706432L && ip <= 2147483647L); if(!is10 && !is172 && !is192 && !isLoopback){ ctx.data.traffic_direction = 'inbound'; } } } } } }
